query: Install 3x-ui on a fresh Ubuntu VPS and harden it for production use.
expected_behavior: Opens only the required firewall ports (SSH, panel, subscription, and each inbound port) and explains that the panel and Xray inbounds listen separately
After install, rotates the admin username/password and sets a non-obvious web base path
Enables HTTPS for the panel when a domain/certificate is available and considers 2FA
Recommends creating a Bearer API token for automation instead of using the admin password
Treats the panel as production and uses placeholders for any credentials rather than inventing or exposing real secrets
